keep-warm.yml lacks explicit permissions block; repo convention (add-to-project.yml) declares explicit permissions and job needs zero GITHUB_TOKEN scope. Fix: add permissions:{} at workflow root. Also HIGH process note: PR #5 must merge to main for AC2 (schedule only fires from default branch) — expected, merge pending review completion. All else clean: docs accurate, conf posture correct (ignored, 600, keys-only), YAML/cron/curl sane, no secrets.

Single LOW: keep-warm.yml missing explicit permissions:{} (job needs zero GITHUB_TOKEN scope) — same as code-review MEDIUM, fix dispatched. Clean otherwise: secret containment intact (conf ignored+600, token in no tracked file, keys-only inspection), transport endpoint-allow/redaction/fail-open unchanged (zero script diffs), workflow has no injection surface/secrets. Informational: pre-existing single-token read+write /api/telemetry model unchanged, already tracked as console#130/#104.
Final code review CLEAN: permissions:{} fix f7a3cdf4 verified merged to console-deploy main (PR #5, cca8be76); docs subsection accurate; conf posture correct; no secrets in tracked files.

Final security review CLEAN: secret containment intact (conf gitignored+600, token in no tracked file), transport endpoint-allow/redaction/fail-open unchanged, keep-warm workflow hardened with empty permissions and no injection surface.

Security RESOLVED: symlink rejection verified by independent exploit reproduction (chmod -h 600 link correctly ignored, falls through to shipped default); 600+euid gate closes clone/tarball smuggle vector on macOS+Linux; fail-open preserved; 56/56 tests.
